bundle.shortDescription: AI-aware system monitor for Windows, Linux, and macOS
bundle.longDescription: dofek is a trading-terminal-styled system monitor with a TUI and a desktop GUI sharing one Rust codebase. It surfaces CPU, GPU, VRAM, memory, network, and disk in real time, with per-process VRAM accounting and AI-workload detection. NVIDIA GPUs are supported via NVML; LibreHardwareMonitor provides a fallback on Windows for CPU temperatures and non-NVIDIA GPUs. A JSON-over-stdio plugin system extends the watchlist (Ollama, Docker, etc.). v1.3 adds a system-tray companion with a live CPU sparkline icon, Linux CPU power via RAPL, and cross-platform disk I/O metrics.

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com
